headline: O'Reilly Automotive Vote Puts Political Spending And Valuation In Focus
summary: Shareholders at O'Reilly Automotive's recent annual general meeting voted on a proposal to address brand risk linked to corporate political spending. The proposal, focused on greater oversight and disclosure of political contributions, was not approved. The vote highlights ongoing investor interest in how the company manages corporate governance and reputational risk. O'Reilly Automotive (NasdaqGS:ORLY) is coming off a long multiyear run, with the stock up 47.8% over 3 years and 150.2%...
